title: selaginella chaetoloma
intro: Selaginella chaetoloma, also known as the hairy spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella chaetoloma include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal compounds.
